Home / Lore / Locations / Coney Island

location

Coney Island

The New York setting of Episode 3, divided between a Black Tusk operation at the ballpark and a Cleaner presence at the amusement park.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Episode 3 battleground

Coney Island extends the conflict beyond Washington and divides Episode 3 between the rescue of Tchernenko from Black Tusk and a separate confrontation with the Cleaners. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    Episode 3 brings Division Agents back to New York, specifically Coney Island, for two main missions. [1][2]

  2. confirmed

    Black Tusk holds Vitaly Tchernenko at the Coney Island Ballpark. [1]

  3. confirmed

    Cleaners are active at the Coney Island Amusement Park. [1]

Sources

  1. [1] Episode 3: Coney Island Live Now! — Ubisoft (2020-02-12). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: Mission routes and collectible coordinates remain pending direct capture.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
